name: Sainoor Premji

Partners in stress management, weight loss coaching, smoking cessation programs, or anxiety counseling could refer clients for whom hypnotherapy would be a natural complement. Co-promotion with therapists, life coaches, or wellness retreat operators who work with clients on deep habit and mindset change would be the strongest JV alignment.

bio: B.Sc, M.Sc (Holistic Nutrition), RNCP, MHt, Master Hypnotist, Akashic Reader, Holistic Nutritionist, Montessori Elementary Teacher
